text:
In the first scene, I feel a sense of shared purpose, yet also a subtle distance between each participant—I am present among many, all seeking meaning or understanding from what is offered on stage. There is a gentle hopefulness in the repeated message about learning, but I sense the fragility of attention in such a formal setting.

In the second scene, surrounded by bold colors and concepts of research and development, my mind feels more awake. The text about confusion and blurred perception resonates with me. Here, I feel an invitation to question, to reflect on how knowledge is created and how easily we can lose sight of it. I feel curious, aware of the limitations of my own perception, but also invigorated by the possibilities of discovery.
